title: Set 02 - Hash Digests, Legacy Hashes & Password Security
subject: Cryptography
topic: Hash Digests, Legacy Hashes & Password Security

questions.question: What is a hash digest?
options: Fixed-length output from a hash function
questions.description: A digest is the hash output for a given input.

questions.question: Which hash should be avoided for collision-resistant uses?
questions.description: MD5 has practical collision attacks and should not be used for security-sensitive integrity.

questions.question: Which algorithm is designed for password hashing?
questions.description: Argon2 is a modern password hashing algorithm with memory-hard settings.
